verse_text: When you go with your adversary to the magistrate, make every effort along the way to settle with him, lest he drag you to the judge, the judge deliver you to the officer, and the officer throw you into prison.

links.context: Luke places this teaching in the context of the end of the age ([[LUK.12:57]]-59); here it is in the context of reconciliation surrounding the Liturgy. Delay in reconciliation allows for the spread of animosity and other evils ([[EPH.4:26]], [[EPH.4:27]]).

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
